title: feat: add a per-repo destination-path-style setting for yaml source
body:
Introduces a new per-repo yaml setting to simplify work with YAML source as referenced in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1072 and in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1531

The change is backward-compatible and doesn't attempt to completely overhaul the format of the yaml manifest as suggested in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1531, but still adds a usable and requested functionality.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@art-shutter any thoughts on moving this forward?
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
